mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_internet_req_mng( req_user , input_name , input_number , input_plan_id , req_state , site_sp , incom_sp , incom_url , rdp_mng_id , counsel_content , proc_content , create_date , create_id) VALUES ( #{reqUser}, TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{inputName},'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng')), TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{inputNumber},'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng')), #{inputPlanId}, 'REQ', #{siteSp}, #{incomSp}, #{incomUrl}, #{rdpMngId}, #{counselContent}, #{procContent}, now(), #{reqUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT outbound_center FROM tb_pmb_internet_req_mng ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_internet_req_mng( req_user , input_name , input_number , input_plan_id , req_state , site_sp , incom_sp , incom_url , rdp_mng_id , is_new ,internet_mno_id ,prod_name ,combination_name ,prod_descript ,tv_prod_name ,channel_count ,internet_speed ,combination_price ,combination_freeble_price ,hope_cons_time ,outbound_center , create_date , create_id) VALUES ( #{reqUser}, TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{inputName},'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng')), TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{inputNumber},'tb_pmb_internet_req_mng')), #{inputPlanId}, 'REQ', #{siteSp}, #{incomSp}, #{incomUrl}, #{rdpMngId}, 'Y', #{internetMnoId}, #{prodName}, #{combinationName}, #{prodDescript}, #{tvProdName}, #{channelCount}, #{internetSpeed}, #{combinationPrice}, #{combinationFreeblePrice}, #{hopeConsTime}, #{outboundCenter}, now(), #{reqUser} )
